challenges.title: Proper HTML5 Document
challenges.description: Create a properly structured HTML5 page with <!DOCTYPE html>, <html>, <head> with <meta charset> and <title>, and a <body> with a paragraph. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a proper HTML5 document -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should start with ' assert '' in html.lower() or ' tag' assert ' tag' assert 'charset' in html.lower(), 'Should specify charset in meta tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <title> tag' assert '<body>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <body> tag' assert '<p>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a paragraph'
hints: Every HTML5 page should start with <!DOCTYPE html>.
The <meta charset="utf-8"> tag goes inside <head> to declare character encoding.
